description: A machine-readable code-of-conduct specification that host workspaces publish to declare operational boundaries for visiting AI agents. Purchased by the agent operator to ensure their agent follows host workspace rules.

enforcement.method: Self-enforcing via SDK checks before each agent action.
enforcement.violation_response: Log violation, halt operation, notify host system.

verification.method: Receipt proves licensee has adopted the RESTArules standard. Actual rule compliance is verified locally by the host SDK.
